NHS PROCUREMENT NOTICE

Solicitation Title: Integrated Population Health Analytics System
Procurement Reference: NHS-2026-POPHEALTH-042
Contracting Authority: North Regional Health System NHS Trust
Published Date: 22 February 2026
Closing Date: 30 April 2026 16:00
Estimated Contract Value: £3.4 Million
Contract Duration: 30 months

OVERVIEW

North Regional Health System NHS Trust provides care across 8 hospitals and 150+ community clinics, serving a population of 1.2 million residents. The Trust requires an integrated analytics platform to understand population health needs, identify high-risk patients, and optimise service delivery across primary, secondary, and community care.

PROJECT OBJECTIVES

Data Consolidation:
- Integrate data from Hospital Electronic Health Record (Epic)
- Connect Primary Care data (GP systems across 200+ practices)
- Include social care data from local authority partners
- Incorporate mental health and community nursing records
- Support 500,000+ active patient records

Population Analytics:
- Cohort identification for chronic disease management (diabetes, COPD, heart disease)
- Risk stratification for unplanned admission prevention
- Identify health inequalities across postcodes and demographics
- Track performance against NHS Outcomes Framework indicators

Service Optimisation:
- Bed occupancy and theatre utilisation dashboards
- Emergency Department activity forecasting
- Outpatient demand analysis by specialty
- Readmission rate tracking and analysis

Integration & Interoperability:
- FHIR-compliant APIs for third-party integration
- HL7 messaging support for legacy systems
- Integration with NHS Digital services (SUS, GPES)
- Open standards for data export and reporting

MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS

1. Support 500,000+ active patient records with sub-second query response
2. Real-time data feed from Epic EHR (minimum 4 feeds per day for primary care)
3. 99.9% system availability during NHS operating hours
4. HIPAA and GDPR compliance with NHS Data Security Protection Toolkit accreditation
5. Role-based access control with NHS job role integration
6. Automated data anonymisation for analytics and research purposes
7. Audit logging for all access and modifications (10-year retention)
8. Integrated quality assurance for data completeness and accuracy

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

- Cloud or on-premises deployment acceptable (NHS preferred suppliers framework aligned)
- Support for 200+ concurrent users
- Integration with Epic EHR via standard HL7/FHIR interfaces
- Modern BI platform (Tableau, Power BI, or equivalent)
- Support for predictive analytics and machine learning models
- Daily automated data refresh with reconciliation to source systems

OPTIONAL ENHANCEMENTS

- Predictive models for 30-day readmission risk
- Integration with social prescribing systems
- Patient portal for self-monitoring and engagement
- Automated alert system for safety incidents (e.g., falls, medication errors)
- Benchmarking against national NHS targets

SCORING

Clinical and Operational Alignment: 40%
Technical Solution and Innovation: 30%
Implementation Track Record with NHS: 20%
Price and Value for Money: 10%

Submit to: procurement@northregionalhealthsystem.nhs.uk
